title: Fluffy Chickpea Falafel Sandwich
description: A delicious sandwich made with crispy falafel, fluffy interior, and served on a toasted bun.
instructions: 1. Preheat a pan or griddle to medium-high heat.
2. Cook the falafel according to package instructions or until crispy.
3. Toast the fluffy bun on the pan or griddle.
4. Spread melted butter on the toasted bun.
5. Add a layer of Middle Eastern salad on top of the bun.
6. Place a cooked falafel on top of the salad.
7. Serve the falafel sandwich with chickpea hummus on the side.
8. Enjoy your delicious Fluffy Chickpea Falafel Sandwich!
